hooks.command: STOP_HOOK_CMD='cd frontend && npm run qc && cd ../backend && npm run qc' bash tools/stop-hook.sh
STOP_HOOK_CMD='cd frontend && npm run qc && cd ../backend && npm run qc' bash tools/stop-hook.sh
npx --prefix frontend prettier --write "frontend/src/**/*.{ts,tsx}" 2>/dev/null; npx --prefix backend prettier --write "backend/src/**/*.ts" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
